fix: restore flex-1 basis-0% for TW4 centering regression

Tailwind v4 changed .flex-1 from 'flex: 1 1 0%' to 'flex: 1'.
While spec-equivalent, this causes centering regressions in nested
flex layouts on some browsers. The override uses a CSS variable to
prevent LightningCSS/Turbopack from collapsing the shorthand back
to 'flex: 1'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(anonymization): add log anonymization pipeline (#72)

* feat(anonymization): add core utilities and regex patterns

Implement anonymizeUtils with:
- SERVER_NAME_PAT: hostname regex requiring at least one dot (prevents bare-digit corruption)
- MATRIX_IDENTIFIER_RE: sigil identifier pattern with uppercase user ID support
- buildAnonymizationDictionary: scan log lines and extract identifiers
- applyAnonymization: two-phase text replacement (sigils, then bare domains)
- buildCompiledAnonymizer/Unanonymizer: compile reusable replacement functions
- ANONYMIZED_LOG_MARKER constant for export detection

Fixes regression where bare digits (e.g., #channel:0) were registered as hostnames,
then globally replaced with aliases, silently corrupting timestamps and numbers.

Support legacy uppercase user ID localparts (@Bob:matrix.org) for pre-spec servers.

Includes comprehensive regression test suite covering both fixes.

* feat(store): add anonymization state and async orchestration

Add state fields to logStore:
- isAnonymized, isAnonymizing, anonymizingProgress (0-1)
- anonymizationDictionary, originalLogLines (backup)
- originalAllRequests, originalAllHttpRequests, originalSentryEvents

Implement anonymizeLogs() action:
- Sync path: ≤500 lines processed directly
- Async path: >500 lines chunked into 1000-line batches
- requestAnimationFrame yielding for UI responsiveness
- progress tracking and cancellation token support
- Backs up original state before mutation
- Calls filterRequests/filterHttpRequests to refresh derived views

Implement supporting actions:
- unanonymizeLogs(externalDict?): restore from backup or use provided dictionary
- cancelAnonymization(): abort in-flight async work
- clearData(): reset all anonymization state

Cross-screen restoration: HTTP requests and Sentry events anonymized in parallel with main log.

* feat(components): add anonymization UI and progress tracking

Add AnonymizingProgressModal component:
- Displays progress bar (0-100%) and message during async anonymization
- Auto-closes when complete
- Respects cancellation

Add UnanonymizeDialog component:
- Allows user to upload JSON dictionary for recovering file-loaded anonymized logs
- Handles recovery when in-memory backup is not available

Integrate anonymization in LogDisplayView:
- Add anonymise button before "Open in new tab" action
- Button state machine: not-anon → anonymizing → anonymized
- Active styling (.btnActive) when isAnonymized
- Call unanonymizeLogs() if backup exists; else open UnanonymizeDialog
- Render progress modal and unanonymize dialog conditionally
- Only show button when showAnonymizeButton prop is true

Add CSS styling for button states and dialog layout.

Includes tests for button visibility, state transitions, and dialog triggers.

* feat(export): integrate anonymization in export flows and parser

Add marker detection and stripping in logParser:
- detectAnonymizedLog(): check for anonymization marker in raw text
- stripAnonymizedMarker(): remove marker before parsing
- Set isAnonymized flag in LogParserResult

Add conditional marker prepend in logExportUtils:
- buildExportText() prepends ANONYMIZED_LOG_MARKER when context.isAnonymized
- Marker appears as first non-empty line for export file detection

Refactor LogExportDialog (separate dictionary export):
- Moved from checkbox + piggyback logic to dedicated "Save anonymisation dictionary" button
- handleSaveDictionary(): independent JSON file download
- handleSave(): now saves only log file (marker prepended if applicable)
- Add flex-wrap to .actionRow for 3+ buttons on narrow viewports

Update LogExportDialog tests:
- Changed 3 test queries from regex /save dictionary/i to exact string match
- Verify button visibility and independence

* chore(demo): extend demo log with anonymization test cases

Add anonymization-relevant log entries to demo.log to showcase:
- Various Matrix identifier types (user IDs, room IDs, event IDs, etc.)
- Edge cases (uppercase user IDs, IPv6 literals, etc.)
- Timestamps and numbers that should NOT be corrupted
- Request URIs and Sentry events for cross-screen restoration verification

* chore: update screenshots

* test: add coverage for anonymisation pipeline

- Add AnonymizingProgressModal.test.tsx covering both rendering branches
  (isAnonymising false → renders nothing; isAnonymising true → renders
  progress dialog) and the Cancel button wiring.

- Extend logStore.test.ts with:
  - async anonymisation path (>500 lines) using vi.useFakeTimers() +
    vi.runAllTimersAsync() to drive the chunked IIFE to completion
  - cancelAnonymisation both in-flight and when already idle
  - is-a-no-op guard when isAnonymising is already true
  - SyncRequest + SentryEvent payloads in the sync anonymise and
    unanonymise-with-external-dict tests so every .map() callback is
    exercised (lines 434, 506, 572, 574)

- Extend UnanonymizeDialog.test.tsx with focus-trap branch coverage:
  Shift+Tab wraps / does not wrap, Tab wraps / does not wrap, and the
  "Choose dictionary file" button triggering the hidden file input.

Fixes all per-folder coverage threshold failures (stores functions was
below 100%; components branches was below 89%).

* fix(anonymization): address PR review comments

getOrCreateDomainAlias — bijective port-bearing aliases
  Port-bearing server names (e.g. example.org:8448) now get a distinct
  forward + reverse entry (domain0.org:8448) instead of sharing the bare
  alias. This keeps the dictionary bijective so unanonymization can fully
  restore identifiers like @alice:example.org:8448.

applyUnanonymization — stop regex at '/'
  The candidateRe was consuming URI path suffixes (e.g. treating
  !room0:domain0.org/messages as one token). Aligned with
  buildCompiledUnanonymizer by adding `/` to the negative character
  class so identifiers embedded in Matrix request URIs round-trip
  correctly.

logStore async path — check cancellation before dictionary build
  A token.cancelled check is now inserted after the first yield but
  before buildAnonymizationDictionary() so cancelling immediately after
  clicking "Anonymise" skips the heavy work rather than letting it run
  to completion.

logStore.loadLogParserResult — reset all anonymization state
  All anonymization-related fields (originalAllRequests,
  originalAllHttpRequests, originalSentryEvents, isAnonymizing,
  anonymizingProgress) are now explicitly reset alongside the existing
  fields so stale backup state cannot linger when a new log is loaded
  mid-session.

UnanonymizeDialog validation — reject arrays and non-string values
  The dictionary validation is tightened with an isPlainStringRecord
  helper that also rejects arrays and objects with non-string values.

logExportUtils — add test for ANONYMIZED_LOG_MARKER in buildExportText
  A new test asserts that the marker is prepended as the first line when
  context.isAnonymized is true.

Tests updated to cover all the above.

* fix(anonymization): address remaining PR review comments

- Align stripAnonymizedMarker with detectAnonymizedLog: both now skip
  leading blank lines when looking for the marker, preventing a mismatch
  where detect would return true but strip would leave the marker in
  contentToParse. Added a test for the leading-blank-lines case.
- Add aria-pressed={isAnonymized} to the anonymise toggle button so
  screen readers can announce the toggle state.
- Cancel currentCancelToken at the start of clearData() and
  loadLogParserResult() so any in-flight async anonymisation cannot write
  stale results back to the store after the data has been cleared or
  replaced.

* fix(anonymization): address remaining PR review comments

- Move AnonymizingProgressModal to App level (AppContent) so the progress
  and cancel UI persists across route changes during async anonymisation.
  Remove it from LogDisplayView where it was only accessible on /logs.
- Optimize detectAnonymizedLog: replace split('\n') with index-based scan,
  matching the approach already used in stripAnonymizedMarker, avoiding a
  full-file allocation for very large logs.
- Fix buildExportText: short-circuit on empty displayItems before pushing
  the anonymization marker, preserving the existing '' contract.
  Add a test for the isAnonymized+empty case.
- Fix FileReader global leak in UnanonymizeDialog tests: capture the
  original value at describe scope and restore in afterEach instead of
  relying on inline restores that can leak on test failure.

* fix(anonymization): address remaining PR review comments

- Sync anonymization path now uses the pre-compiled apply function for
  log line text fields (rawText, message, strippedMessage,
  continuationLines) instead of anonymizeLogLine(l, dict), mirroring the
  async path and avoiding redundant per-call regex compilation. Remove the
  now-unused anonymizeLogLine import from logStore.ts.
- LogExportDialog tests: call useLogStore.getState().clearData() in the
  shared beforeEach and afterEach hooks so isAnonymized/
  anonymizationDictionary state is always reset before and after every
  test. Remove per-test manual useLogStore.setState resets.

* fix(anonymization): address remaining PR review comments

- Surface errors from the async anonymization path: catch (error) now
  populates store.error via wrapError so the UI can display the failure
  message instead of silently resetting to idle.
- Make unanonymizeLogs() return boolean: the in-memory backup path
  always returns true; the external-dictionary path now detects a
  dictionary mismatch (no line text changed after applying the restore)
  and returns false without committing any state change, leaving
  isAnonymized=true. UnanonymizeDialog.handleApply checks the return
  value and, on failure, shows an inline error instead of closing.
  Added tests for the mismatch detection in both logStore and
  UnanonymizeDialog.

* Update src/utils/anonymizeUtils.ts

https://github.com/manuroe/rageshake-viewer/pull/72#discussion_r3067690337

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(anonymization): keep dots in unanonymizer token regex

The previous commit excluded `.` from the candidateRe character class
while trying to strip trailing punctuation. Because `.` is valid inside
Matrix IDs (domain names like `domain0.org`), tokens such as
`@user0:domain0.org` were matched as only `@user0:domain0`, the reverse
lookup failed, and phase 2 then partially restored the domain suffix —
yielding `@user0:example.org` instead of the correct `@alice:example.org`.

Fix: remove `.` from the exclusion list so the regex only stops at
characters that cannot appear inside a Matrix ID (`,`, `;`, `)`, `]`,
`"`, `'`, `?`).

Also adds regression tests for both applyUnanonymization and
buildCompiledUnanonymizer covering tokens followed by trailing punctuation.

* Add typed attempt-policy contracts, per-attempt artifacts, failure-class keyed reflection, and authoritative hook enforcement

- retry_strategy.ts: Add AttemptPolicyContract interface, AttemptArtifact interface,
  ATTEMPT_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA_VERSION constant, and buildAttemptArtifact() factory function.
  Produces deterministic per-attempt outcome artifacts with policy thresholds applied.

- policy_engine.ts: Add PreExecuteEnforcementResult interface and
  enforcePreExecuteHookDecisions() function. Wraps generateRuntimeHookDecisions() as the
  authoritative pre-execute hook gate returning a typed enforcement result.

- worker_runner.ts: Export loadReflectionMemoryContext() with optional failureClass
  parameter for failure-class keyed reflection retrieval. Replace inline hook enforcement
  with enforcePreExecuteHookDecisions(). Pass instruction.failureClass to reflection
  loader on rework dispatches. Produce AttemptArtifact on each attempt and include it
  in the runWorkerConversation return value.

- tests/core/worker_runner.test.ts: Add 17 new tests covering:
  * loadReflectionMemoryContext with failureClass filtering (positive + negative)
  * enforcePreExecuteHookDecisions behavior and typing (including negative path)
  * buildAttemptArtifact shape, policy resolution, and null safety

commit.message:
refactor(scanner): migrate to parking_lot::Mutex and fix lock ordering

- Replace std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex across all server modules
  to eliminate poison panic risk (parking_lot never poisons on thread panic)
- Remove all .lock().unwrap() calls; parking_lot lock() returns guard directly
- Fix lock ordering bug in handle_refresh: extract cache_path from projects
  before acquiring connections lock to prevent potential deadlock
- Fix lock ordering in register_client: drop active_clients before acquiring
  last_activity lock
- Fix chars().next().unwrap() panics in FindDerivedClasses and GetAssetUsages
  handlers by using if-let pattern on empty class name edge case
- Fix file_name().unwrap() panic in refresh.rs for paths ending in separator
- Add panic hook in server_main to log panics via tracing instead of silently
  crashing

Files changed: Cargo.toml, completion.rs, query/config.rs, refresh.rs,
server/asset.rs, server/handlers.rs, server/state.rs, server/watcher.rs,
server_main.rs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor(db): migrate from falkordb-py to falkordblite

Replace the external FalkorDB server dependency with falkordblite,
an embedded, zero-config FalkorDB instance. This eliminates the need
for a separate FalkorDB/Redis container.

Key changes:
- graph_manager: use AsyncFalkorDB from redislite with file-based DB
- graph_manager: use ro_query() for read-only queries
- graph_manager: init DB in lifespan startup (not lazy)
- config: replace FALKORDB_HOST/PORT/PASSWORD with FALKORDB_DB_PATH
- docker-compose: remove falkordb service, add data volume
- README: update docs for embedded architecture

fix(#144): scrollToItem/animateScrollToItem with scrollOffset=Int.MAX_VALUE (#149)

Scrolls to true bottom of the list, not top of last item.
For messages taller than the viewport, the previous calls landed
mid-message. Int.MAX_VALUE is clamped by LazyColumn layout to the
maximum valid offset — the actual end of scroll range.

commit.message:
fix: binary mode for luac helper on Windows + correct bytecode header test offset

- Set stdin/stdout to _O_BINARY on Windows in luac_helper.c to prevent
  \n -> \r\n text mode conversion corrupting bytecode output
- Fix test assertions to check byte 15 (sizeof lua_Integer) instead of
  byte 17 (which is LUAC_INT data, not a size field)
- The old tests accidentally passed on Windows due to text mode shifting
  bytes by +2, making byte 17 coincidentally hold sizeof(lua_Integer)

refactor(llm): replace raw httpx with LiteLLM

Use litellm.acompletion() instead of manual httpx POST to

  format e.g. 'ollama/mistral', 'gpt-4o') and optional LLM_API_BASE

commit.message:
refactor: extract descent loop into named phase functions

Main loop is now 10 lines calling named phases:
  runImplementorPhase() → runEvaluatorPhase() → runEscalation() → runTerminatorPhase()

Extracted 6 functions from the 465-line monolith:
- resumeOrInitState() — resume/init logic
- runImplementorPhase() — research + plan + exec with error checks
- runEvaluatorPhase() — evaluate + git commit/revert + record
- runEscalation() — campaigns + radical plan
- runTerminatorPhase() — rule check + agentic terminator
- handleIterationError() — revert + error report

All share a LoopContext struct. No behavior changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Feat/bootstrap makefile (#91)

* feat(deploy): add make bootstrap target with per-environment Flux Kustomizations

Replace single deploy/flux/kustomization.yaml with per-environment files
(kustomization-dev.yaml, kustomization-staging.yaml, kustomization-prod.yaml)
and add a `make bootstrap [environment]` target that applies FluxCD source
resources and environment-specific Kustomizations.

- `make bootstrap` applies GitRepository + ImageRepository source resources
- `make bootstrap production` applies sources + infra Kustomizations + env overlay
- Supports aliases: production→prod, development→dev
- Update docs, README, and test matrix to reference new file structure

* fix(deploy): update stale comment in flagger-kustomization.yaml

Reference kustomization-{env}.yaml instead of removed kustomization.yaml.

* Apply suggestions from code review

commit.message:
Add Capabilities panel for MCP servers, tools & skills

New panel (🔌 Capabilities button in control bar) shows:
- MCP Servers with status dots (connected/disabled/pending/failed)
  and toggle switches to enable/disable per session
- Tool chips inside each MCP server card, showing which tools
  each server provides (click to exclude/include)
- Skills section with enable/disable toggles
- Filter input to search across all capabilities
- Collapsible sections with enabled/total count badges

Backend: Added bridge methods for MCP list/enable/disable, tools
list, and skill disable. Server handles list_capabilities,
toggle_mcp, and toggle_skill WebSocket messages.
